items.title: BitTorrent’s disastrous, legendary, and controversial story
items.description: Twenty-five years ago today, a young, little-known programmer by the name of Bram Cohen fired off a short message to a mailing list for peer-to-peer enthusiasts. items.title: Elon Musk denies a report about SpaceX’s AI phone prototype
items.description: Elon Musk says a report about a SpaceX AI phone prototype is "utterly false."
